attachmentConfig.description:
Configuration for attachment validation constraints.
When provided, file attachments are validated against these rules.

features.description: Feature flags to control composer capabilities.

onSubmit.description:
Handler invoked when the form is submitted.

Native form submission is always prevented before this handler runs. Call event.preventDefault() from inside the handler to also suppress the composer's own submit() action; otherwise the composer submits as usual after the handler returns.

variant.description:
The visual layout variant of the composer. - 'default' – Stacked layout: attachment list, textarea, then toolbar below. - 'compact' – Inline layout: start actions, textarea, end actions in a single row.

When omitted, inherits from the nearest ChatVariantProvider (e.g. set by ChatBox).
